title: Shri Devi Talab Mandir
tagline: Shri Devi Talab Mandir — spiritual town of Punjab

overview.short: Devi Talab Mandir is a Hindu temple, located in Jalandhar, Punjab, India.
overview.description: Devi Talab Mandir is a Hindu temple, located in Jalandhar, Punjab, India. The temple is devoted to Goddess Durga and is visited by thousands of pilgrims every year. It is regarded as one of the 51 Shakta pithas in India. A model of the Amarnath Temple, dedicated to God Shiva, is located within the temple complex.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

nearestAirport.name: Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kishanpur
topPlaces.description: Kishanpur is a village in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from district headquarter Jalandhar and 151 kilometres (94 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Reru
topPlaces.description: Reru is a village in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 52 kilometres (32 mi) from Shahkot, 35 kilometres (22 mi) from Nakodar, 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from district headquarter Jalandhar and 152 kilometres (94 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya is a college in Jalandhar, Punjab. The college was founded by Mahatma Hansraj Mahila in 1927 in Lahore, Pakistan.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Kartarpur
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Kartarpur occurred on 25 April 1635. It was the final major military engagement of Guru Hargobind, the sixth Sikh Guru, against the imperial forces of the Mughal Empire.

topPlaces.name: Jalandhar
topPlaces.description: Jalandhar (IPA: /d͡ʒəːləndə̀ɾᵊ/) is a city in the state of Punjab in India. With a considerable population, it ranks as the third most-populous city in the state and is the largest city in the Doaba region.

topPlaces.name: Kanya Maha Vidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Kanya Maha Vidyalaya (The Heritage Autonomous Institution) (KMV) is a women's college located in Jalandhar, Punjab, India, offering undergraduate and postgraduate programmes and diplomas. It has approximately 4000 students and a campus of around 32 acres (13 ha).

topPlaces.name: Gandhi Stadium
topPlaces.description: Gandhi Stadium or Burlton Park or BS Bedi Stadium is located in the city of Jalandhar, Punjab and is used for cricket matches. As of 19 August 2017 it has hosted 1 Test and 3 ODIs.

topPlaces.name: Surjit Hockey Stadium
topPlaces.description: The Surjit Hockey Stadium, also sometimes spelled as Surjeet Hockey Stadium, is a field hockey stadium in Jalandhar, Punjab, India. It is named after Jalandhar-born Olympian Surjit Singh.

items.note: Kishanpur is a village in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from district headquarter Jalandhar and 151 kilometres (94 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

Reru is a village in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 52 kilometres (32 mi) from Shahkot, 35 kilometres (22 mi) from Nakodar, 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from district headquarter Jalandhar and 152 kilometres (94 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.
Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya is a college in Jalandhar, Punjab. The college was founded by Mahatma Hansraj Mahila in 1927 in Lahore, Pakistan.
The Battle of Kartarpur occurred on 25 April 1635. It was the final major military engagement of Guru Hargobind, the sixth Sikh Guru, against the imperial forces of the Mughal Empire.

Jalandhar (IPA: /d͡ʒəːləndə̀ɾᵊ/) is a city in the state of Punjab in India. With a considerable population, it ranks as the third most-populous city in the state and is the largest city in the Doaba region.

Kanya Maha Vidyalaya (The Heritage Autonomous Institution) (KMV) is a women's college located in Jalandhar, Punjab, India, offering undergraduate and postgraduate programmes and diplomas. It has approximately 4000 students and a campus of around 32 acres (13 ha).
Gandhi Stadium or Burlton Park or BS Bedi Stadium is located in the city of Jalandhar, Punjab and is used for cricket matches. As of 19 August 2017 it has hosted 1 Test and 3 ODIs.
The Surjit Hockey Stadium, also sometimes spelled as Surjeet Hockey Stadium, is a field hockey stadium in Jalandhar, Punjab, India. It is named after Jalandhar-born Olympian Surjit Singh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Devi Talab Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Devi Talab Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Devi Talab Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Devi Talab Mandir?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Devi Talab Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Devi Talab Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Devi Talab Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Devi Talab Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kishanpur, Reru, Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya, Battle of Kartarpur, Jalandhar.
